title: combine

messages.description: message to be combined with another input close in time
time interval for combining items to a list

body: [combine] collects messages (with one or more elements) into a single list if they come within a certain given amount of time, but not if greater than it. A "0" time is possible if messages are sent in a sequence such as from a [loop] object. Each item or list is appended to the previous stored items. A negative time value will not combine anything.
